.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard convention (java.io before java.net).
Reformat string concatenation in DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to a single line.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.before:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.after:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL =
        "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat constant string assignments to single lines.
Reformat constant string assignments to single lines.
Add space after 'if' keyword in conditional statement.
Add space after 'if' keyword in conditional statement.
Add space after 'if' keyword and reformat nested conditionals.
Reformat System.out.println call to single line.
Reformat anonymous inner class instantiation for Authenticator.
Remove trailing whitespace/newline at end of file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Refactor log message string concatenation to use Java 13+ text blocks for better readability.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles to ensure meaningful log output.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Update Cassandra driver data type from ASCII to TEXT to match modern driver API expectations.
Remove unused import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile.
Remove unused import tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants.
Remove imports for Zalando Problem modules that are no longer used in the configuration class.
Remove the bean definition for the ProblemModule Jackson module.
Remove the bean definition for the ConstraintViolationProblemModule Jackson module.
Remove deprecated WebSecurity configuration method in favor of SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method is no longer used when defining SecurityFilterChain beans; keeping it is redundant and potentially confusing.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Content Security Policy to use dynamic configuration from JHipsterProperties.
Update frame options from deny to sameOrigin to allow embedded resources if needed.
Replace custom JWTConfigurer with standard OAuth2 resource server setup.
Replace CorsFilter with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
Remove unused imports related to the old security configuration.
Add new imports required for the updated security configuration.
Update constructor to inject JHipsterProperties instead of TokenProvider, CorsFilter, and SecurityProblemSupport.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(TokenProvider tokenProvider, CorsFilter corsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Configuration annotation to the security configuration class.
Remove @Import annotation for SecurityProblemSupport as it is no longer used.
Update static resource location to include the root static directory.
Refactor resource path patterns to use file extensions and broader matching instead of directory prefixes.
Remove try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException when decoding URL, as UTF-8 is guaranteed to be supported since Java 7.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error, the exception handling is redundant and the method signature change (removing .name()) aligns with modern API usage where charset name is not needed for standard charsets.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove registration of Swagger v2 endpoints (/v2/api-docs, /swagger-resources) and add Swagger v3 UI endpoint (/swagger-ui/**).
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Swagger v2 endpoints are removed in favor of OpenAPI 3 (Swagger v3) in newer SpringDoc/Swagger versions; registering old endpoints may cause 404s or conflicts.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The exception class is no longer referenced in the code after removing the try-catch block, causing an unused import warning or error depending on compiler settings.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for java.util.*.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The wildcard import is no longer needed as specific classes are not used or were removed, causing an unused import warning.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for org.springframework.http.MediaType.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class is no longer referenced in the code, causing an unused import warning.
